_meta.source: allo_vendors.exotel_calls (shared paid # 8045680561, routed_to=lead_to_call) backtracked to bookings_data_raw, -2/+30d, by call-week
_meta.note: City-pool = callers to the shared Bangalore paid number (no clinic chosen). won=booked at Indiranagar (Tier 2). elsewhere=booked at another clinic. noconv=didn't book. Latest 1-2 weeks undercount won/elsewhere (the +30d booking window is still open).
